== Notes for [[Item:Q83219|Q83219]] ==

ROMAN EMPORER 138-161; BORN 9/19/86; ADOPTED HIS WIFE'S NEPHEW, MARCUS
AURELIUS, WHO PEACEFULLY SUCCEEDED HIM

WROTE AS "PTOLEMY""APPIAN""ARRIAN"

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F29409BEAFA1EFBBE49822EF79916CB03C
geni:6000000003828382726

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
